beauty_reviews.description: Customer reviews for Amazon Beauty & Personal Care products (2000–2023). Contains star ratings, review text, helpfulness votes, and verification status. 701K rows.
sample_questions: Which brands have the highest average rating?
Show review volume by year
What percentage of reviews are verified purchases?
Which products have the most helpful votes?
Show the distribution of star ratings
What is the average review length by star rating?

columns.star_rating: 1–5 star rating given by reviewer. 4.0+ is considered positive sentiment at Amazon
columns.review_title: Short title/headline of the review written by reviewer
columns.review_text: Full text body of the review. Use str.len() for length analysis
columns.helpful_votes: Number of times other users clicked 'helpful' on this review. NOT a product quality metric — reflects review quality/usefulness
columns.verified_purchase: True if Amazon confirmed the reviewer purchased the product. Filter to True to reduce fake reviews
columns.parent_asin: Product identifier. Join to beauty_products or electronics_products on parent_asin
columns.product_title: Name of the product being reviewed
columns.price: Product price in USD at time of listing. Has ~74% null rate — always dropna() before price analysis

data_caveats: price has ~74% null rate — always dropna() or use notna() filter before price analysis
star_rating is float (e.g. 4.0, not 4) — use >= 4.0 not == 4
review_date goes back to year 2000 but most reviews are post-2015
helpful_votes is often 0 — consider filtering helpful_votes > 0 for helpful review analysis

beauty_products.description: Amazon Beauty product catalog with metadata: average ratings, price, brand, category. 112K unique products. Join to beauty_reviews on parent_asin.
sample_questions: Which brands have the most products listed?
What is the price distribution of beauty products?
Which products have the highest number of ratings?
Show average product rating by brand
What are the most expensive beauty products?

columns.parent_asin: Product identifier. Join to beauty_reviews or electronics_reviews on parent_asin
columns.product_title: Full product name as listed on Amazon
columns.main_category: Top-level category — always 'All Beauty' in this table
columns.average_rating: Aggregate average star rating across all reviews for the product (float, 1.0–5.0)
columns.rating_number: Total count of ratings (not reviews) the product has received. High values indicate popular products
columns.price: Current list price in USD. Has ~74% null rate — always dropna() before price analysis
columns.brand: Brand or store name. May be null for generic/unbranded products
columns.categories: List of subcategories (e.g. ['Hair Care', 'Shampoo']). Use explode() to analyze subcategory breakdown

data_caveats: price has ~74% null rate — always dropna() before price analysis
average_rating is the product-level aggregate, not per-review. Use beauty_reviews for per-review star_rating
rating_number counts ratings, which includes star-only ratings with no text review

electronics_reviews.description: Customer reviews for Amazon Electronics products (1998–2023). Same schema as beauty_reviews but for electronics category. 500K rows.
sample_questions: How does electronics review sentiment compare to beauty?
Which electronics sub-categories get the best ratings?
Show electronics review volume growth over time
What is the average rating for electronics vs beauty products?
Which electronics products have the most helpful reviews?

columns.star_rating: 1–5 star rating. 4.0+ considered positive. Electronics avg ~4.23 vs Beauty ~3.96
columns.helpful_votes: Number of helpful upvotes on this review
columns.verified_purchase: True if Amazon confirmed the reviewer purchased the product
columns.parent_asin: Product identifier. Join to electronics_products on parent_asin

data_caveats: This is a 500K sample of a 22GB dataset — not the full electronics catalog
Date range starts from 1998 but volume is sparse before 2010

electronics_products.description: Amazon Electronics product catalog with metadata. 161K unique products from first shard. Join to electronics_reviews on parent_asin.
sample_questions: Which electronics brands have the most products?
What is the price range of electronics products?
Which electronics sub-categories have the highest average ratings?
Compare average ratings between electronics and beauty product catalogs

columns.parent_asin: Product identifier. Join to electronics_reviews on parent_asin
columns.product_title: Full product name as listed on Amazon
columns.average_rating: Aggregate average star rating across all reviews (float, 1.0–5.0)
columns.rating_number: Total count of ratings the product has received
columns.price: Current list price in USD. High null rate — always dropna() before price analysis
columns.categories: List of subcategories. Use explode() to analyze subcategory breakdown

data_caveats: This is shard 0 of 10 from the full electronics catalog — not all electronics products are present
price has high null rate — always dropna() before price analysis
main_category values vary: 'All Electronics', 'Computers', 'Camera & Photo', etc.
